name: 12pk Tealight Cozy Cashmere Candle - Threshold™: Votive Ambiance, Palm & Paraffin Wax, 4hr Burn Time
description: Light up your room and decor with the 12pk Tealight Cozy Cashmere Candle from Threshold. This paraffin wax candle comes in a beautiful container and has an approximate burn time of four hours. Featuring scents of berry, amber, vanilla and woodsy, lighting the candle will create an aromatic ambience. And once the candle burns out, use the container to store trinkets or knick-knacks.
